creator: pieter.donche@ua.ac.be
text:
In the last 2 weeks I had some 8 kernel panics with caused spontaneous reboots.

My system is running since 1,5 year and I hadn't these problems in the past.
I upgraded from 7.2 to FreeBSD-8.0-RELEASE-p3 a month ago.
So these kernel panics didn't happen immedialty after the major upgrade.

Yesterday I applied the latest security patch -p4 hoping this would do some
good, but no: tonight there was another kernel panic and reboot.

I have a crash dump. I include the first part of the /var/crash/core.txt.0
file (dus to the upload limit of 100 K)

Please can you help me to find the cause and solve the problem?
Thanks.
